title: Legend on Map
excerpt: It would be great if there was a way to add a legend on the map view, so we can at a quick glance see what items are based on the color of the pin. Thank you.

posts.author: apantoja (Archie Pantoja)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if there was a way to add a legend on the map view, so we can at a quick glance see what items are based on the color of the pin. Thank you.
